event: General Washington at Christ Church on Easter Sunday 1795
description: A historical scene depicting George Washington emerging from a horse-drawn carriage before Christ Church, Philadelphia. Washington, in formal 18th-century attire with a powdered wig, greets congregants outside the church. Women in colorful colonial dresses, men in frock coats, and children surround him. The church building with its classical facade and bell tower rises in the background amid green trees. A coachman sits atop the ornate gilded carriage. The scene is warm and festive, depicting a moment of American civic and religious life.

_meta.title: General Washington at Christ Church, Easter Sunday, 1795
